---
title: "Análise de Correspondencia"
author: "Guilherme Henrique Hispagol Bicho"
date: "2026-03-14"
output: html_document
---

```{r echo=TRUE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
###############################################
## Pacotes
############################################################
#install.packages("devtools")  # se ainda não tiver
#devtools::install_github("mortenarendt/data4consumerscience")
library(tidyverse)
library(kableExtra)
# install.packages(c("FactoMineR", "factoextra"))
library(FactoMineR)
library(factoextra)

############################################################
# 1) Carregar dados
############################################################
library(data4consumerscience)
library(ca)
data("beercata")
# Ver a documentação
#help("beercata")
#??beercata

# Identificar atributos (tudo menos Beer e Consumer)
atributos <- names(beercata)[-(1:2)]

###############################################
## 1) Criar tabela de contingência Beer x Atributos
###############################################
tabela_cata <- aggregate(
  beercata[atributos],
  by = list(Beer = beercata$Beer),
  FUN = sum
)

rownames(tabela_cata) <- tabela_cata$Beer
tabela_cata$Beer <- NULL

tabela <- as.matrix(tabela_cata)

###############################################
## 2) Tabela de frequências absolutas
###############################################
N <- tabela
N

###############################################
## 3) Tabela de frequências relativas
###############################################
n_total <- sum(N)
P <- N / n_total; P

###############################################
## 4) Massas de linhas e colunas
###############################################
r <- rowSums(P)   # massas das linhas
c <- colSums(P)   # massas das colunas

Dr_inv <- diag(1/sqrt(r))
Dc_inv <- diag(1/sqrt(c))

###############################################
## 5) Matriz central da CA
##    S = Dr^{-1/2} (P - r c^T) Dc^{-1/2}
###############################################
S <- Dr_inv %*% (P - r %*% t(c)) %*% Dc_inv

###############################################
## 6) SVD
###############################################
sv <- svd(S)
U <- sv$u
Delta <- sv$d
V <- sv$v

###############################################
## 7) Autovalores e inércia
###############################################
eigenvalues <- Delta^2
total_inertia <- sum(eigenvalues)
prop_inertia <- eigenvalues / total_inertia
cum_inertia <- cumsum(prop_inertia)

###############################################
## 7.1) Gráfico de Cotovelo – Scree Plot (manual)
###############################################
par(mfrow=c(1,2))

# Barras
barplot(
  eigenvalues,
  main = "Scree Plot (Autovalores)",
  xlab = "Dimensão",
  ylab = "Autovalor"
)

# Linhas + pontos
plot(
  eigenvalues, type="b", pch=19,
  main="Scree Plot (Linha)",
  xlab="Dimensão", ylab="Autovalor"
)

par(mfrow=c(1,1))

###############################################
## 7.2) Gráfico da Inércia Acumulada
###############################################
plot(
  cum_inertia, type="b", pch=19,
  ylim=c(0,1),
  main="Inércia Acumulada",
  xlab="Dimensão",
  ylab="Proporção Acumulada"
)
abline(h=0.8, col="red", lty=2)  # linha de referência 80%

###############################################
## 8) Coordenadas fatoriais
###############################################
F <- Dr_inv %*% U %*% diag(Delta)   # linhas
G <- Dc_inv %*% V %*% diag(Delta)   # colunas

###############################################
## 9) Contribuições
###############################################
ctr_rows <- (r * F^2) / eigenvalues    # contribuições das linhas
ctr_cols <- (c * G^2) / eigenvalues    # contribuições das colunas

###############################################
## 10) cos² — qualidade da representação
###############################################
cos2_rows <- F^2 / rowSums(F^2)
cos2_cols <- G^2 / colSums(G^2)

###############################################
## 11) Teste qui-quadrado
###############################################
expected <- r %*% t(c)
chisq <- n_total * sum((P - expected)^2 / expected)

df <- (nrow(N) - 1) * (ncol(N) - 1)
p_value <- 1 - pchisq(chisq, df)

###############################################
## 12) Gráfico biplot simples
###############################################
plot(F[,1], F[,2],
     pch = 19, col = "blue",
     xlab = "Dim 1", ylab = "Dim 2",
     main = "CA - Biplot (Linhas e Colunas)",
     xlim = range(c(F[,1], G[,1])),
     ylim = range(c(F[,2], G[,2])))

text(F[,1], F[,2], labels = rownames(F), pos = 3, col = "blue")

points(G[,1], G[,2], pch = 17, col = "red")
text(G[,1], G[,2], labels = colnames(G), pos = 3, col = "red")

###############################################
## 12.1) Biplot via Factoextra com eixos invertidos
###############################################
res.ca <- CA(tabela, graph=FALSE)
res_inv <- res.ca

res_inv$row$coord <- -res.ca$row$coord
res_inv$col$coord <- -res.ca$col$coord

fviz_ca_biplot(
  res_inv,
  map = "symmetric",
  repel = TRUE,
  title = "Biplot Simétrico (Eixos Invertidos)"
)

###############################################
## 13) Exibir resultados numéricos
###############################################
cat("Autovalores:\n")
print(eigenvalues)

cat("\nProporção da inércia:\n")
print(prop_inertia)

cat("\nQui-quadrado:", chisq, "\n")
cat("Graus de liberdade:", df, "\n")
cat("p-valor:", p_value, "\n")



###############################################
## 13) Exibir resultados
###############################################
cat("Autovalores:\n")
print(eigenvalues)

cat("\nProporção da inércia:\n")
print(prop_inertia)

cat("\nQui-quadrado:", chisq, "\n")
cat("Graus de liberdade:", df, "\n")
cat("p-valor:", p_value, "\n")



# Desativar notação científica temporariamente
options(scipen = 999)

cat("Autovalores:\n")
print(format(eigenvalues, scientific = FALSE))

cat("\nProporção da inércia:\n")
print(format(prop_inertia, scientific = FALSE))

cat("\nQui-quadrado:", format(chisq, scientific = FALSE), "\n")
cat("Graus de liberdade:", format(df, scientific = FALSE), "\n")
cat("p-valor:", format(p_value, scientific = FALSE), "\n")
cat("p-valor:", format(p_value, scientific = TRUE), "\n")
cat("p-valor:", signif(p_value, digits = 50), "\n")
sprintf("p-valor: %.10e", p_value)


eigen_df <- as.data.frame(res.ca$eig)
colnames(eigen_df) <- c("Autovalor", "% da Variância", "% Acumulado")

kable(eigen_df, caption = "Autovalores e Inércia") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE)


library(factoextra)
library(ggplot2)
library(patchwork)

# Dados dos autovalores
eig <- as.data.frame(res.ca$eig)
colnames(eig) <- c("Eigenvalue", "VariancePercent")
eig$CumVariance <- cumsum(eig$VariancePercent)
eig$Dim <- paste0("Dim", 1:nrow(eig))

# Gráfico 1 — Scree Plot (%)
g1 <- fviz_screeplot(
  res.ca,
  addlabels = TRUE,
  ylim = c(0, 100),
  main = "Scree Plot - Autovalores (%)"
)

# Gráfico 2 — Variância Acumulada
g2 <- ggplot(eig, aes(x = Dim, y = CumVariance)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  geom_line(aes(group = 1)) +
  geom_text(aes(label = paste0(round(CumVariance, 1), "%")),
            vjust = -0.6, size = 4) +
  ylim(0, 100) +
  labs(
    title = "Variância Acumulada",
    x = "Dimensão",
    y = "Variância Acumulada (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))

# Junta lado a lado
g1 + g2


fviz_nbclust(
  res.ca$row$coord[,1:2],
  kmeans,
  method = "wss",
  k.max = 5
)


set.seed(123)

clusters <- kmeans(res.ca$row$coord[,1:2], centers = 3)

fviz_ca_biplot(
  res.ca,
  map = "symmetric",
  repel = TRUE,
  col.row = factor(clusters$cluster),
  col.col = "black",
  pointsize = 4,
  labelsize = 4,
  addEllipses = TRUE,
  ellipse.level = 0.95,
  ellipse.type = "confidence",
  palette = "jco",
  ggtheme = theme_minimal(),
  title = "Correspondence Analysis Biplot with 3 Clusters"
)

###############################################
## FIM
###############################################
```
